condition_group: Critical conflict / unavailable rule / unsupported scope
examples: Multiple policy records; plan configuration missing; unsupported product or policy version; evidence contradiction
notes: Never resolve conflicting system information by guesswork.

examples: Policy inactive on incident date; category not covered; verified device not enrolled; annual/theft limit exhausted; confirmed exclusion
notes: Only when facts are verified and sufficient. Do not request nonessential evidence first.

condition_group: Material eligibility fact missing or unclear
examples: No incident date; no usable IMEI/serial; claim category unclear; no unique policy record

condition_group: Eligibility passed but anomaly or exception needs judgement
examples: Potential duplicate; high-cost exception; repeat-claim pattern; date anomaly; unresolved mismatch
notes: Risk indicators route a case; they never cause automatic decline.

condition_group: Eligibility passed but mandatory supporting evidence missing
examples: Required photos, repair quote, police-report reference, or proof of purchase absent
notes: Evidence profile will be defined in Item #7.

examples: Coverage, dates, device, limits, exclusions, risk and evidence checks all satisfied
notes: Means eligible for standard processing, not final claim approval.
